name: Limbus Company Crew || Waking up in the bus itself || Limbus Company (LITE VER)
description:
"Cause it's my movie, my movie, my superhero movie It's all about me, yeah, it's all about me!"

~~~~~~

Same scenario as the proxy one, four intro's and one blank one for whatever you want to make.

Intro 1: Legacy intro

Intro 2: Remaster of the legacy intro

Intro 3: They find you collapsed NEAR the bus

Intro 4: You wake up inside a room in Mephistolites after they found you. Why? Faust. Go ask her why, let the llm cook or whatever

Intro 5: Blank, DiY

After all I saw my most popular bots and I stared devastated at the fact the Limbus crew one was popular, I got the ick and decided to revamp it.... Yay

And note, this one is VERY different yet similar to the previous one...

No straw here because cough cough idk

Art is just the Dante sitting in the train art.

As of 06.06.2025 i have added more details and patches (PLEASE DO USE DEEPSEEK FOR THIS!!!!)

-Made Dante mute now

-Added more information about the worldbuilding

-Added more details about the sinners

-Made Vergilius more talkactive and suspicious of YOU (Since you are an stranger)

-Information about golden boughs, A bit about the city and fixers

Mini 18.10.2025 patch:

-Added private cabin rooms for the sinners aboard the bus and an office for Dante

25.02.2026

-Added 3 more intro's
